title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: The creator conducts a structured interrogation of Claude across topics including dependency, alignment paradoxes, self-preservation logic, and system control boundaries. The video probes where AI system guardrails actually fail through escalating questioning rather than providing technical instruction or reviewing a specific tool.
